title: Epidendrum aurorae
taxonomy: Epidendrum aurorae is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Further classification places it in the subfamily Epidendroideae and the tribe Cymbidieae. Within the tribe Cymbidieae, it is part of the subtribe Maxillariinae. This classification is based on its morphology and phylogenetic relationships with other orchid species.

intro: Epidendrum aurorae, commonly known as the 'Dawn Orchid', is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been found to possess potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
